summary: Completed frontend testing of SriSuktam Organics e-commerce website. Tested admin login, product browsing, cart functionality, category filtering, and newsletter subscription. Most features working correctly with some admin dashboard and cart issues identified.

ui_bugs.issue: Admin dashboard route /admin redirects to homepage instead of showing admin interface
Add to cart button does not add items to cart for unauthenticated users - cart remains empty

integration_issues.issue: Admin login succeeds but dashboard access fails - routing issue
Cart functionality requires authentication - no guest cart support

issues: Dialog z-index overlay blocking form submissions (resolved with force=True)

passed_tests: Homepage loading with proper branding and layout
Category filtering (24 products → 3 products for Cold Pressed Oils)
All 17 backend API endpoints working correctly
Product filtering sidebar with category checkboxes
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix admin dashboard routing issue - /admin route should display admin interface instead of redirecting to homepage. Consider implementing guest cart functionality or show clear authentication requirement for cart operations.
